markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Yainer Diaz records 5+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Houston vs Texas professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 7:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Yainer Diaz is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Yainer Diaz starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Yainer Diaz is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Yainer Diaz is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Yainer Diaz: 5+ hits + runs + RBIs?

If LaMonte Wade Jr. starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If LaMonte Wade Jr. is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If LaMonte Wade Jr. is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on stolen bases recorded.
markets.title: LaMonte Wade Jr.: 1+ stolen bases?
